title: Fibroblast culture from rodent/lagomorph ear
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9l6uk","text":"This protocol describes the procedure for isolating and culturing either primary fibroblasts from the ear pinnae or fetal fibroblasts from the ear buds and head skin of rodents and lagomorphs, including Acomys, Mus, Rattus, and Oryctolagus, used in the Seifert Lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":203,"length":6},{"style":"italic","offset":211,"length":3},{"style":"italic","offset":216,"length":6},{"style":"italic","offset":228,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7bifl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ct5ns","text":"Note that any protocol involving animals should be approved by your Institutional Animal Care\nand Use Committee (IACUC) before use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Anaesthetize/euthanize animal appropriately For Acomys and Mus , we anaesthetize with 3 % (v/v) IsoThesia (Isoflurane) Solution Henry Schein Animal Health Catalog #029405 at 1 psi oxygen flow rate
Harvest tissue from the center of the left and right ear pinna with a 4 mm biopsy punch Sklar Catalog #96-1146
Follow the following procedure for primary fibroblasts from adult animals
Place tissue from both ears for each animal into a single 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes Contributed by users

Enzymatically dissociate the tissue first with a with 1:1 trypsin (0.25%)-dispase mix for 1 hour at 37 o C. Dice up tissue with a razor and transfer tissue into a new eppendorf tube with 1X HBSS. Spin at 2000 rpm for 7 minutes. After that take out the HBSS and add collagenase IV (2.5 mg/ml) and incubate at 37 o C for 1 hour.
Remove the enzyme, add 1X HBSS and mechanically dissociate cells by filtering through a Falcon® 70 µm cell strainer Corning Catalog #352350 , with the gentle nudge of a syringe (3-10ml) plunger.
Pellet the suspension by spinning at 2000g x 7 minutes at 26 o C.

Resuspend pellet in DMEM and Hams F-12 50/50 Fisher Scientific Catalog #MT10090CV supplemented with 10% FBS (HyClone) Contributed by users and 1% Antibiotic/Antimycotic (100X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15240062
Culture at 37 °C under 3% O 2 and 5% CO 2 in Tissue culture dish (10 cm) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z707651
Passage at ~80% confluency. Count cells using a hemocytometer and seed 300,000-500,000 cells in a fresh Tissue culture dish (10 cm) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z707651
Follow the following procedure for fetal fibroblasts from embryos from timed-pregnant females after euthanasia
Dissect the ear buds and head skin from the embryo
Place tissue into 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes Contributed by users
Enzymatically dissociate cells with 0.25% trypsin for 00:10:00 at 37 °C
Neutralize the enzyme in complete growth medium containing serum

Culture cells in DMEM and Hams F-12 50/50 Fisher Scientific Catalog #MT10090CV supplemented with 10% FBS (HyClone) Contributed by users and 1% Antibiotic/Antimycotic (100X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15240062 at 37 °C under 3% O 2 and 5% CO 2 in Tissue culture dish (10 cm) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z707651
Mechanically dissociate the tissue using a 20 gauge needle to obtain a single-cell suspension
creator: Ashley Seifert
